channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Latest Luigi Mangione hearing shrouded in secrecy as judge shuts out press and public
item.description: A hearing in Luigi Mangione’s state murder case was held in secret after the judge shut out the press and public without explanation.

item.title: Suspect who took 10 people hostage in California standoff has been shot and killed, police say
Trump’s Education Department is backing away from addressing civil rights for Black students
